summary: I wrote the technical design to `.pipeliner/phases/02-plan/main/design-writer/output/design.md`. It specifies moving the existing `shared/_theme_toggle` partial out of the sidebar's header row (`app/views/shared/_sidebar.html.erb`) and into the sidebar's footer block, grouped with "Sign out" in a flex row (toggle right-aligned via `ml-auto`, `gap-2` spacing per the style guide) so the pair reads as one related unit. No changes to the toggle partial, Stimulus controller, theme helper, FOUC script, or the auth/sign-in layout — only the sidebar partial and the system test change. The design includes a before/after diff for both the header and footer markup, an accessibility/tab-order note, explicit non-goals (no new top bar, no page-header changes), and a two-file change list, each tied back to requirements R1–R7 from the requirements doc.
